metadata.short_desc: Track group message counts with leaderboards and scheduled push
metadata.desc: Track group member message counts. Supports total/daily/weekly/monthly/yearly leaderboards, LLM title generation, and scheduled push.

theme.hint: Visual theme for the leaderboard image (overridden when auto theme switch is enabled)

auto_theme_switch.hint: Automatically switch between light/dark themes based on time, overrides manual theme setting

detailed_logging_enabled.hint: Disable to hide detailed message stats logs, only keep important system and error logs

rand.hint: Number of users shown on the leaderboard, recommended 5-50

if_send_pic.hint: Choose display mode: image mode is more visually appealing but uses more resources

timer_enabled.hint: Auto push leaderboard at scheduled time to specified groups

timer_push_time.hint: Supports HH:MM format (daily specified time) or cron format (complex expressions like '0 9 * * *' for 9 AM daily)

timer_target_groups.hint: Group IDs to receive scheduled push, leave empty to push to all groups

timer_rank_type.hint: Select the statistics range for scheduled push leaderboard

milestone_enabled.hint: Auto push leaderboard when user reaches milestone message count

milestone_targets.hint: Message counts that trigger milestone push, e.g. 666, 1000, 5000, 10000

blocked_users.hint: Block specified users from appearing on leaderboards and statistics. Enter full user IDs (QQ number or Telegram user ID).

blocked_groups.hint: Block specified groups from statistics and leaderboard commands. Enter full group IDs (QQ group number or Telegram group ID).

llm_enabled.hint: Generate personalized titles for members based on message stats using LLM during scheduled push

llm_provider_id.hint: Select the LLM Provider for title generation. Leave empty to use the current session's default provider.

llm_system_prompt.hint: Customize title generation style, colors and JSON format. Leave empty for default template.

llm_max_retries.hint: Number of retries when LLM call fails

llm_min_daily_messages.hint: Only users with daily messages >= this value get LLM titles. Set to 0 to analyze all users with messages.

llm_enable_on_manual.hint: Also generate LLM titles when using manual commands like leaderboard (note: consumes Tokens)

image_language.hint: Language for text in leaderboard images
